examples: Supermarkets have started proclaiming the greenness of their products.
If you'd like to recognize the greenness of an individual or organization, why not nominate them for an Environmental Achievement Award.
Glass cautions that most studies don't necessarily prove a causal link between greenness and health, but they're nonetheless helping spur action.
And the crash can be especially jarring if greenness is one of the causes.
This is especially true when third parties require that greenness.
